items.title: Bernie Sanders attends 'No Kings' protest against Trump in DC
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Protesting the direction of the country under President Donald Trump, people gathered Saturday in the nation’s capital and communities across the U.S. for “ No Kings ” demonstrations that the president's Republican Party disparaged as “Hate America” rallies. (AP video by Mike Pesoli).

#trump 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: ‘No Kings’ protests across the US against Trump administration
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live from across the U.S. as protesters join a “No Kings” demonstration against U.S. President Donald Trump and his administration's policies. Read more: https://bit.ly/4hg3ta3 

#nokings #trump #live</article>

items.title: Lights lit across India to mark Diwali
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Volunteers lit oil lamps illuminating the path leading up to the India gate memorial in New Delhi on Saturday ahead of the festival of lights, Diwali. (AP video by Shonal Ganguly, Piyush Nagpal, Channi Anand, and Rajanish Kakade)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Hundreds join anti-Trump protests in Paris and Spain
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Several hundred people, mostly American expatriates, gathered in Paris and Madrid on Saturday in support of the 'No King' day movement that is expected to draw large crowds in the U.S. against President Donald Trump's policies. (AP video by Alexander Turnbull and Iain Sullivan)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Ukrainians express disappointment at possibility of not obtaining US Tomahawk missiles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Kyiv residents expressed disappointment Saturday after U.S. President Donald Trump signaled to his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelenskyy that he was leaning against selling long-range Tomahawk missiles to Ukraine. (AP video by Bela Szandelszky)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Shroom with a view: Kenyan firm turns fungi into eco-friendly building materials
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A Kenyan company is turning mushrooms into building materials, offering a cheaper, greener way to construct homes. 

MycoTile uses fungi mixed with sugarcane waste to create insulation panels that could help ease the city’s housing crisis and cut carbon emissions.

#shorts #kenya #funghi #homes</article>

items.title: ICE’s use of full-body restraints raises concerns
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>The Associated Press identified multiple instances of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement using a full-body restraint device known as the WRAP during deportations. Six people told the AP they were restrained in the device, sometimes for hours, on deportation flights dating to 2020.</article>

items.title: Three cricketers among those killed as police in Afghanistan accuse Pakistan of cross-border strikes
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The Afghanistan Cricket Board withdrew its national team from next month’s Twenty20 tri-series in Pakistan after it claimed three local cricketers died due to Pakistan military strikes in southeastern Paktika province on Friday. (AP video shot by: Shafiqullah Mashal)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Argentine president Milei rallies with supporters ahead of legislative elections
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>After a busy week that included a high-stakes meeting with US President Donald Trump, Argentine President Javier Milei on Friday led a political rally in Buenos Aires as part of efforts to gain support in the country's upcoming midterm elections. (AP video shot by Cristian Kovadloff)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Four police officers injured during demonstration near the US Embassy in Bogota
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least four police officers were injured on Friday while intervening in a demonstration by protesters near the US Embassy in Bogota, the city's mayor said. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: LIVE: Dogs in costumes participate in Lansing pet store’s annual ‘Howl-o-ween’ event
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as a pet store hosts a trick-or-treat event for dogs. More than 200 costumed canines are expected to show up for the annual “Howl-o-ween” event in Michigan’s capital, Lansing.

#halloween #dog #michigan #usa #live</article>

items.title: Kamala Harris says Republicans are responsible for the government shutdown
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>As Democrats dig in for a lengthening US government shutdown, former Vice President Kamala Harris is cheering them on as she travels the country touting her presidential campaign memoir amid speculation about another White House run.

#kamalaharris 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: What to know about Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Diwali is the most important festival of the year in India — and for Hindus in particular. It is celebrated across faiths by more than a billion people in the world’s most populous nation and across the diaspora. (AP video: Eugene Garcia).

#diwali  

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Outside court as John Bolton pleads not guilty to classified information charges
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as John Bolton is expected to surrender to authorities and make his first court appearance. The former Trump administration national security adviser faces charges of storing top secret records at home and sharing diary-like notes containing classified information with relatives. Read more: https://bit.ly/4qusv9E

#johnbolton #usa #live</article>

items.title: Hawaii volcano LIVE: Eruption from Kilauea
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view of Kilauea, Hawaii’s most active volcano. The volcano on the Big Island of Hawaii has been erupting on-and-off since December.

#hawaii #volcano #usa #live</article>
